data.name: CLOCKWORK PUSSY
data.detailed_description:
A young mechanic inherits a large vehicle repair workshop from a former sexual client. However, this workshop is located on a paradisiacal island, dominated by a dangerous gang of criminals. What exactly does this gang produce in the depths of this island?

She is a specialist in vehicle mechanics — cars, motorcycles, airplanes, tanks, anything with wheels or wings. Raised by her mother, she discovers that her late client, a mysterious and wealthy man, not only left her the workshop but also a valuable collection of vehicles filling the space.

However, she will have to face a relentless gang that controls both the island and the surrounding maritime traffic.

What will be her main weapon? Sex, seduction, strategy, and violence. She doesn't hide her obsession with sex, which is only rivaled by her passion for the smell of fuel and grease. Her late client hid something extremely important in the workshop, and the gang knows it. They will do whatever it takes to find this hidden treasure — something far more coveted than anything they’ve ever encountered. But what is it?

This game is in constant development, with ongoing improvements and bug fixes, always striving to offer the best experience for players.

This is a third-person game where you control the protagonist as she explores a remote island full of mysteries and dangers. The main objective is to uncover why the character inherited an island controlled by criminals and traffickers. As you explore different locations, you will face traps and confrontations with an relentless group that will stop at nothing to ensure she doesn’t stay there. Use your mechanical skills, strategy, and combat abilities to survive and uncover the secrets the island holds.

The experience of the game goes far beyond exploring the workshop in search of a valuable object or seducing criminals with sex, libido, and body fluids. During this unusual search, Anais discovers things about her that could change her destiny completely. It is very likely that she inherited much more from her sexual client than she imagines.

Something, perhaps much more dangerous!

data.short_description: A young mechanic and former nymphomaniac sex worker inherits a massive vehicle repair workshop from her late client. However, this workshop is located on a remote island, in the heart of a neighborhood controlled by a dangerous gang of criminal outcasts.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-750, 2.67 GHz | AMD
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia Geforce GTX 660 (2 GB) | AMD Radeon HD 7870 (2 GB)
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7, 2.67 GHz
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GEFORCE RTX 2070 or Superior
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
